summary: Highly regarded audience recording with clear instrument separation and even EQ, though the low end is a bit muddy.
review: Reviewers consider this the best audience tape of the show, praising its balanced mix, good level separation and well‑blended vocals. The only drawback noted is a muddy low‑frequency response that can obscure Phil Lesh's bass tone. No specific musical performance details were mentioned in the review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review, focused on recording quality; strong praise pushes rating high but lack of show commentary limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Vocals well blended, instruments have nice level and separation, EQ is more even than other tapes. Low end is muddy, which detracts from bass clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific performance remarks provided in the review.

band_member_comments.Phil: Muddy low end noted as a drawback for his bass presence.
